title: Positive flow: Navigating to NCAAB news feed
test_steps: Open the app. | Tap on the NCAAB tab in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The screen should display the NCAAB news feed.

title: Negative flow: Navigating to an invalid tab
test_steps: Open the app. | Tap on the MLB tab in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The screen should display the MLB news feed.

title: Positive flow: Clicking on a news item
test_steps: Open the app. | Tap on the NCAAB tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the first news item in the list.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the detailed view of the selected news item.

title: Negative flow: Clicking on an invalid news item
test_steps: Open the app. | Tap on the NCAAB tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the last news item in the list.
expected_result: The screen should display the NCAAB news feed.

title: Positive flow: Toggling the hamburger menu
test_steps: Open the app. | Tap on the hamburger menu icon in the header.
expected_result: The hamburger menu should open, displaying navigation options.

title: Negative flow: Toggling the hamburger menu when already open
test_steps: Open the app. | Tap on the hamburger menu icon in the header. | Tap on the hamburger menu icon again.
expected_result: The hamburger menu should remain open.

title: Positive flow: Using the search icon
test_steps: Open the app. | Tap on the search icon in the header.
expected_result: The search interface should be displayed.

title: Negative flow: Using the search icon when already open
test_steps: Open the app. | Tap on the search icon in the header. | Tap on the search icon again.
expected_result: The search interface should remain open.

title: Positive flow: Navigating to a different tab
test_steps: Open the app. | Tap on the NCAAB tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the NBA tab in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The screen should display the NBA news feed.

title: Negative flow: Navigating to an invalid tab
test_steps: Open the app. | Tap on the NCAAB tab in the navigation bar. | Tap on the MLB tab in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The screen should display the MLB news feed.
